# SilkQuote

> A fully functional CPQ (Configure, Price, Quote) built natively on Salesforce — with a collaborative deal room, quote tracking, and e-signature. Free for unlimited users.

SilkQuote is a native Salesforce CPQ application. It handles the full quoting process: admins configure products, pricing rules, and branded templates; reps build accurate quotes with guided product selection, conditional fields, and automated pricing — all without leaving Salesforce. Finished quotes are shared via a hosted collaborative deal room where prospects can review, ask questions, upload documents, and sign. Leaders track every interaction from open to close.

**Key facts:**
- Full CPQ: product catalog, pricing rules, guided selling, and quote generation
- Free: unlimited users, quotes, and templates
- Works with Salesforce Professional Edition and above
- No-code template and product configurator for admins
- One-click quote generation from any Opportunity
- Native Salesforce integration (Lightning Experience)
- Collaborative deal room with e-signature, Q&A, shared resources, and next steps
- Quote view tracking, open tracking, and acceptance logging
- Invocable from Salesforce Flows for automation
